◎简　　介  

　　Remember the ﬁnal scene of Go Toto! (FID 2017) : Madelene disappears, setting off to join the boar piglet she rescued and raised in her house in Vattetot. She makes a surreptitious reappearance at the start of A Beautiful Summer dropping Flora off at her neighbour Simon’s house.
